summary: Completed frontend-only testing for 5 changes: 1) dal 1983 removal from nav/logo, 2) CTA section order, 3) promo cards clickable, 4) busy slots display, 5) mobile login button. 6 of 7 tests passed. One issue found: duplicate 'dal 1983' in Chi Siamo section comes from backend DEFAULT_WEBSITE_CONFIG.

minor.issue: DEFAULT_WEBSITE_CONFIG in routes/public.py has 'Dal 1983' in both about_title AND about_text causing duplicate display in Chi Siamo section

issues: Duplicate 'dal 1983' appears 3 times - from about_title ('Dal 1983 con Passione'), about_text ('Dal 1983 con grande...'), and stats section ('1983' year). The stats '1983' is correct, but about_title and about_text both mentioning 'Dal 1983' is redundant.

passed_tests: TEST 1: 'dal 1983' NOT found in nav/logo area (desktop) - PASS
TEST 2: CTA section 'Pronta per il tuo look?' appears BEFORE gallery section (index 5 vs 6) - PASS
TEST 3: Mobile admin button found with data-testid='mobile-admin-btn' - PASS
TEST 4: Footer does NOT contain 'Parrucchieri dal 1983' or 'dal 1983' - PASS
TEST 5: Promo cards have cursor-pointer class and data-testid, clickable with toast - PASS
TEST 6: Time slots grid shows 10:00 and 14:30 as occupied (red/disabled) on 2026-03-18 - PASS
TEST 7: Clicking occupied slot shows toast 'Orario 10:00 occupato per tutti gli operatori' - PASS
TEST 8: Mobile login button visible on mobile viewport - PASS
TEST 9: 'dal 1983' NOT in mobile nav - PASS
failed_tests: TEST 10: Chi Siamo section has 'dal 1983' appearing 3 times (duplicate in about_title and about_text)
action_items: Fix duplicate 'dal 1983' in Chi Siamo section by updating backend DEFAULT_WEBSITE_CONFIG: change about_title from 'Dal 1983 con Passione' to something else like 'Passione per la bellezza' or just remove 'Dal 1983' prefix from about_text
critical_code_review_comments: Backend routes/public.py line 116-118: DEFAULT_WEBSITE_CONFIG has 'Dal 1983' in both about_title and about_text - this is the source of duplicate 'dal 1983' in Chi Siamo section
seed_data_creation: Test appointments already exist at 2026-03-18 10:00 and 14:30
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 requested changes verified: 1) Nav/logo/footer clean of 'dal 1983', 2) CTA section correctly positioned before gallery, 3) Promo cards have cursor-pointer and data-testid, 4) Busy slots API works and UI shows red/disabled for occupied slots with toast suggestion, 5) Mobile has login button. Only remaining issue is duplicate 'dal 1983' text in Chi Siamo section coming from backend config (about_title + about_text both starting with 'Dal 1983').
